newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Only routine RNS items around early June; the prior trading update reiterated 2026 underlying trading broadly in line with 2025 (ex ~GBP2m Plano last-time-buy benefit) and a 12% operating-margin target, with the board considering further cost actions. Next results September 2, 2026.

verdicts.rankRationale: Hidden current-sense/thin-film resistor content in AI-server power paths is unchanged; only routine RNS since June 9 and no fresh order/margin signal. Low-crowding microcap (-1.4% YTD) keeps an intact residual-alpha setup; hold the high-conviction rank 3.
verdicts.bull: Underfollowed UK passive/power-sensing supplier with current-sense and film-resistor content in AI-server power paths; minimal crowding, intact residual upside.
verdicts.neutral: Flat trading guidance, no fresh catalyst; thin liquidity and small float cap conviction.
verdicts.bear: 2026 trading only 'broadly in line', margin recovery to 12% unproven; AI-content linkage indirect.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Margin recovery to 12% target; design wins in power conversion

verdicts.rankRationale: Sensors/power-conversion/EMS for regulated markets remains a speculative latent edge-AI candidate; no new aerospace/defense, medical or electrification wins since June 9. Evidence tier unchanged, so hold rank 17 on this under-covered supply-chain screen.
verdicts.bull: Sensors, power conversion and EMS for aerospace/defense and medical could migrate into edge-AI and thermal-control niches.
verdicts.neutral: Latent thesis with no confirming wins; flat guidance keeps it speculative.
verdicts.bear: No direct AI revenue line; margin pressure and cyclical industrial demand dominate the near term.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Latent thesis stays latent; industrial softness

verdicts.rankRationale: Under the strict medium-evidence bar, nothing since June 9 raises or lowers the evidence tier (routine RNS only). Rugged-electronics/thermal-control migration remains qualitative; hold rank 23 rather than churn the strict screen.
